title: Edit a note while offline
description: Cover the offline-edit + reconnect path end to end, including conflict surfacing.
iWant: to edit my notes while offline and have changes sync when I reconnect
soThat: I can keep working on trains, planes, and behind firewalls

acceptanceCriteria.description: Editing a note while offline persists locally
acceptanceCriteria.given: the device is offline and a note is loaded
acceptanceCriteria.when: the user edits and saves the note
acceptanceCriteria.then: the change is stored locally and visible in the note list

acceptanceCriteria.description: Reconnect triggers automatic sync of pending edits
acceptanceCriteria.then: edits are uploaded within 30 seconds and remote reflects the new state

acceptanceCriteria.description: Conflict surfaced when remote diverges from local
acceptanceCriteria.given: the same note was edited locally offline and on another device
acceptanceCriteria.then: the conflict is surfaced in the UI with both versions visible
